servinfo.title: Cylinder Head Cover Removal and Installation

s1.ptxt: Disconnect negative (–) cable at battery.
Remove air cleaner assembly.
Remove ignition coil assemblies.
Disconnect engine harness clamps.
Remove oil level gauge (1).
Disconnect PCV hose (2) from PCV valve and breather hose (3) from cylinder head cover.
Remove PCV valve (4) from cylinder head cover, if necessary.
Loosen cylinder head cover mounting bolts in numerical order (“1” – “14”) evenly and gradually.
Remove cylinder head cover (1) with gasket (2).
Remove oil, old sealant and dust from sealing surfaces on cylinder head and cover.
Install new gasket (2) to cylinder head cover (1).
Apply sealant “A” to mating surface of timing chain cover (1) and cylinder head (2).
Install cylinder head cover to cylinder head.

attention3.ptxt: When installing cylinder head cover, use care so that cylinder head cover gasket will not get out of place or fall off.

s1.ptxt: Tighten cylinder head cover bolts according to the following procedure:

s2.ptxt: Tighten cylinder head cover bolts to 3.0 N·m (0.31 kgf-m, 2.5 lbf-ft) in numerical order (“1” – “14”) evenly and gradually.
Retighten them to 5.0 N·m (0.51 kgf-m, 4.0 lbf-ft) in the same manner as in Step a).
Retighten them to 7.5 N·m (0.76 kgf-m, 5.5 lbf-ft) in the same manner as in Step a).

torqueitem.t-note: 3.0 N·m → 5.0 N·m → 7.5 N·m (0.31 kgf-m → 0.51 kgf-m→ 0.76 kgf-m, 2.5 lbf-ft → 4.0 lbf-ft → 5.5 lbf-ft)

s1.ptxt: Install PCV valve (3) to cylinder head cover and tighten PCV valve to specified torque, if removed.
Connect PCV hose (2) to PCV valve (3).
Connect breather hose (4) to cylinder head cover.
Install oil level gauge (1).
Install ignition coil assemblies.
Connect engine harness clamps.
Install air cleaner assembly.
Connect negative (–) cable at battery.
